user.title: AI Usage Monitor
user.description: Configure your AI service cookies to monitor usage. At least one service must be configured.

data_description.cursor_cookie: Full cookie string from cursor.com (must include WorkosCursorSessionToken)
data_description.claude_cookie: Full cookie string from claude.ai (must include sessionKey)
data_description.claude_org_id: Your Claude organization UUID (found in the URL on claude.ai)
data_description.scan_interval: How often to poll for updates (60-3600 seconds)

error.no_services: At least one service (Cursor or Claude) must be configured
error.invalid_cursor_cookie: Could not authenticate with Cursor. Check your cookie.
error.cursor_auth_error: Cursor rejected the cookie (HTTP 401/403). The cookie may be invalid or expired.
error.cursor_rate_limited: Cursor rate-limited this request (HTTP 429). Please wait a moment and try again.
error.cursor_server_error: Cursor returned a server error (HTTP 5xx). Try again later.
error.cursor_unknown_error: Cursor returned an unexpected response. Check your cookie and try again.
error.cursor_connection_error: Could not connect to Cursor. Check your network and try again.
